aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Allied Heating & Air Conditioning due to insufficient conversational content and missing authority signals.
quick_wins: Add FAQ content addressing common HVAC queries.
Implement HowTo schema for common HVAC repair and installation processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit NAP citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: Missing LocalBusiness schema details (e.g., address, opening hours).
No FAQPage schema to address common customer queries.
No HowTo schema for explaining HVAC services or repairs.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured, conversational content tailored for AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and Denver-specific solutions.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ schema and expanding content to address local HVAC needs.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, NATE-certified technicians, and 24/7 emergency services to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, Allied Heating & Air Conditioning misses out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and FAQ content rank higher in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy will optimize your site with schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to capture AI-driven traffic.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Ready HVAC Leads for Your Denver Business
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services visible to AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI search and drive more leads.
